mapper.select: SELECT FOOD_SEQ, FOOD_NAME, FOOD_CALORIES, FOOD_CARBOHYDRATE, FOOD_PROTEIN, FOOD_FAT, FOOD_SUGAR, FOOD_NATRIUM, FOOD_WEIGHT FROM FOOD_INFO ORDER BY FOOD_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOOD_INFO(FOOD_SEQ, FOOD_NAME, FOOD_CALORIES, FOOD_CARBOHYDRATE, FOOD_PROTEIN, FOOD_FAT, FOOD_SUGAR, FOOD_NATRIUM, FOOD_WEIGHT, USER_ID, REG_ID, REG_DT, CHG_ID, CHG_DT) VALUES ((SELECT NULLIF(MAX(A.FOOD_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM FOOD_INFO A), #{food_name}, #{food_calories}, #{food_carbohydrate}, #{food_protein}, #{food_fat}, #{food_sugar}, #{food_natrium}, #{food_weight}, #{user_id}, 0, #{user_id}, SYSDATE(), #{user_id}, SYSDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT F.FOOD_SEQ, F.FOOD_NAME, F.FOOD_CALORIES, F.FOOD_CARBOHYDRATE, F.FOOD_PROTEIN, F.FOOD_FAT, F.FOOD_SUGAR, F.FOOD_NATRIUM, F.FOOD_WEIGHT, F.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(F.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DT FROM FOOD_INFO F, USER_INFO U WHERE F.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND F.FOOD_SEG = #{food_seq}
